result.content:
FINAL_ANSWER: 0.2222 eV
JUSTIFICATION: 1. Parameters: Band gap Eg = 3 eV. 1s exciton peak E1s = 1 eV. 2. Model: Exciton energy levels follow the Rydberg formula En = Eg - Ry/n^2. 3. Convention: The 1s peak energy is the energy required to create the exciton, E1s = Eg - Ry/1^2. 4. Calculation: 1 = 3 - Ry implies Ry = 2 eV. The binding energy for n=3 is Eb(n=3) = Ry/n^2 = 2 / 3^2 = 2/9 approx 0.2222 eV.
